title: 1st Battle of Yildun Rest
content:
May 13th, 2429

 

Equestrian, Human, & Sarden Ships Present

  • ESAV Starswirl: Starswirl-Type Exploration Craft - Survived
  • ESAV Cloudsdale: Cloudsdale-Class Colony Ship - Destroyed
  • ESAV Stratusburg: Cloudsdale-Class Colony Ship - Destroyed
  • ESAV Las Pegasus: Cloudsdale-Class Colony Ship - Survived
  • ESAV Bright Star: Manehattan-Class Patrol Ship - Destroyed
  • ESAV Neon Lights: Manehattan-Class Patrol Ship - Survived
  • USS Shanghai: China-Class Cruiser - Survived
  • USS Wuhan: China-Class Cruiser - Destroyed
  • USS Taipei: China-Class Cruiser - Destroyed
  • USS Kunming: China-Class Cruiser - Destroyed
  • USS Kinshasa: Congo-Class Corvette - Destroyed
  • USS Bandundu: Congo-Class Corvette - Survived
  • Clan Kalimi SS Brambles: Bebai-Class Sarden Refit - Survived
  • SS Jolly Roger: Captain Yarr's Ship - Survived

Total: 14 Ships: 6 Destroyed, 8 Survived

Huachavi-Apleen Alliance Ships Present

  • MDS Gibet: X-16 Battlecruiser - Survived
  • MDS Windon: X-16 Battlecruiser - Survived
  • MDS Mandran I: D-18 Destroyer - Destroyed
  • MDS Mandran II: D-18 Destroyer - Survived
  • MDS Rhanus I: C-22 Corvette - Survived
  • MDS Rhanus III: C-22 Corvette - Destroyed
  • MDS Rhanus IV: C-22 Corvette - Destroyed
  • MDS Dusket V: C-22 Corvette - Survived
  • MDS Macraque II: C-22 Corvette - Survived
  • MDS Macraque III: C-22 Corvette - Survived
  • MDS Macraque IV: C-22 Corvette - Survived
  • MDS Mamosey I: C-22 Corvette - Survived
  • MDS Mamosey II: C-22 Corvette - Survived
  • HAS Huecha's Wisdom: Huechavi Crystal Ship - Survived
  • HAS Huecha's Wrath: Huechavi Crystal Ship - Survived
  • HAS Avenger: Huechavi Crystal Ship - Survived
  • HAS Highseer: Huechavi Command Cruiser - Survived

Total: 16 Ships: 3 Destroyed, 13 Survived

The attack on the planet Yildun Rest was a surprise, preemptive strike preformed by Apleen and Huachavi military forces. Yildun Rest was the first Equestrian Colony, although minor numbers Sardens and Humans had inhabited the planet even before the arrival of the ESAV Starswirl in 2418. Three Equestrian Cloudsdale-Class Colony Ships were located in the atmosphere of the planet, each holding about 500 Equestrians, and nearly 15 thousand Equestrians in the ground based colony of New Ponyville, all alongside a combined population of ~7,000 Humans and Sardens. The battle began when the MDS Gibet jumped into low orbit of the planet and annihilated the ESAV Stratusburg and all it's inhabitants. Over the next two hours, the remaining colony ships, the Cloudsdale and the Las Pegasus, engaged in a frantic evacuation of New Ponyville, with a nearby Sardan carrier owned by the Kalimi clan, the SS Brambles, responding to their distress call and helping with the evacuation.

 

The engagement began in earnest shortly after the three ships had fully evacuated the planet, when the rest of the Apleen and Huachavi fleet arrived above the planet. It seemed like all Equestrian and Floran ships would be completely and utterly destroyed, until a United Systems Confederacy task force arrived to their aid, followed shortly by two Equestrian Manehattan-Class ships. The full power of Huachavi Crystal Ships was shown during the battle when the trio of said ships used their beam weapon to completely obliterate the ESAV Cloudsdale. The historic ship ESAV Starswirl would have been destroyed in the battle if it not for the late arrival of the Starborn pirate, Yarr. Eventually the remaining Equestrian, Sarden, and Human ships were able to jump out of the system and flee, but at the cost of over 6,500 colonists and crew. The First Battle of Yildun Rest would galvanize the Equestrian people, and lead to the creation of the Sector Alliance shortly afterwards, but most importantly, it marked the beginning of the Great War.
